page_meta: AskBiz Ltd · Effective date: 10 April 2026 · Last updated: 10 June 2026
sec_1_p1: AskBiz Ltd (“AskBiz”, “we”, “us”) operates the AI-powered business intelligence platform at askbiz.co. We are the data controller for personal data processed through our platform.
sec_2_account_body: Your name, email address, business type, and country when you register.
sec_2_usage_body: Questions asked, files uploaded (metadata only — not content), features used, and session information.
sec_2_technical_body: IP address hash (SHA-256 — raw IP never stored), browser type, and device information for fraud prevention and security.
sec_2_payment_body: Processed by Stripe (card payments) and mobile money providers including M-Pesa, MTN Mobile Money, and Airtel Money (where available). We never see or store your card details or mobile money PINs.
sec_2_camera_body: If you use AskBiz POS camera scanning (barcode or price tag recognition), images are processed in real time on your device and via our AI pipeline. Raw images are never stored — only the extracted product data (name, price, barcode) is retained.
sec_2_logistics_body: If you use the AskBiz POS logistics module, we process parcel tracking information, delivery routes, vehicle inspection photos, driver handover records, and delivery addresses. Delivery addresses are retained for the duration of the shipment plus 90 days.
sec_2_location_body: We use IP-based geolocation to detect your country for currency localisation and pricing display. We do not use GPS or precise location tracking. Your raw IP address is never stored (see Technical data above).
sec_2_trial_body: If you activate a free trial (Growth plan or POS), we store the trial type, start date, end date, and conversion status to manage your subscription.
sec_2_financial_label: With your consent only — Financial data:
sec_2_financial_body: If you opt in to financial data personalisation (see Section 6), we store aggregated financial metrics from your uploaded files.
sec_3_item_0: Providing and improving the AskBiz service
sec_3_item_1: Authenticating your identity and securing your account
sec_3_item_2: Processing your subscription payments via Stripe
sec_3_item_3: Preventing fraud and abuse (IP hash analysis)
sec_3_item_4: Sending service-related emails (account confirmations, billing receipts)
sec_3_item_5: Processing camera images for barcode and price tag scanning (POS module)
sec_3_item_6: Managing logistics, parcel tracking, and delivery routes (POS logistics module)
sec_3_item_7: Detecting your country via IP geolocation for currency and pricing localisation
sec_3_item_8: Managing free trial eligibility, duration, and conversion tracking
sec_3_item_9: With your consent: personalising AI answers using your financial data
sec_3_item_10: With your consent: improving AI accuracy using anonymised sector data
sec_4_row_1_0: AI analysis of your uploaded data
sec_5_p1_pre: To improve AskBiz, we collect the following
sec_5_p1_post: when you upload files. This does not require separate consent as it falls under legitimate interest:
sec_5_item_2: Column header names only (e.g. “Revenue”, “Stock”) — never the data values
sec_5_item_3: Your business type and country from your profile
sec_5_p2: We never store your actual data values, business names, customer records, or financial figures
sec_6_p1_pre: If you choose to enable financial data personalisation in Settings → Privacy, we store additional data to improve your AI experience. This processing is based entirely on your
sec_6_p1_post: which you can withdraw at any time.
sec_6_box1_description: Stores aggregated financial metrics from your uploaded files to personalise AI answers and track your business trends over time.
sec_6_box2_description: Uses fully anonymised, aggregated data to improve AI answer quality and generate sector trend alerts for businesses in your industry.
sec_6_box2_notstored_3: Any data from fewer than 5 businesses
sec_6_p2_post: then automatically deleted. You can delete it sooner at any time in the Privacy section of our website.
sec_6_p3_pre: You can manage your consent settings at any time at
sec_7_p1: When you consent to AI improvement, you may receive alerts about trends detected across businesses in your sector — for example “UK retail margins have declined 8% this month.” These alerts are:
sec_7_item_0_post: — your business is never identifiable in any alert
sec_7_item_1_post: — only generated when at least 5 businesses contribute to the signal
sec_7_item_2_post: — you only receive alerts relevant to your business type and country
sec_7_item_3_post: — sector trend data is never sold or shared with third parties
sec_8_p1: We share your data only with the following processors, all bound by appropriate data processing agreements:
sec_8_item_1_post: — AI processing of your questions (USA — Standard Contractual Clauses apply)
sec_8_item_2_post: — real-time web search used by our AI agent to retrieve market data (USA — Standard Contractual Clauses apply). Only your search queries are transmitted, never your personal or financial data.
sec_8_item_5_post: — transactional email delivery (USA — Standard Contractual Clauses apply). Used only for account and billing emails.
sec_8_item_6_post: — receipt delivery for AskBiz POS module (USA — Meta Data Processing Agreement and Standard Contractual Clauses apply). Customer phone numbers are transmitted only when customer opts in to receipt delivery; never stored by AskBiz after 30 days.
sec_8_item_7_post: — mobile money payment processing for Kenyan and East African users (Kenya — Safaricom Data Processing Terms apply). Only transaction reference and amount are transmitted; M-Pesa PINs are never seen or stored by AskBiz.
sec_8_item_8_post: — mobile money payment processing for West and Central African users (regional — respective Data Processing Terms apply). Only transaction reference and amount are transmitted.
sec_8_item_9_post: — payment gateway for M-Pesa and mobile money transactions (Kenya — PesaPal Data Processing Agreement applies). Processes payment callbacks and subscription conversions.
sec_8_p2: We never sell your data. We never share your data with advertisers. We never share individual business data with other AskBiz users.
sec_8_p3_pre: If you use AskBiz to process your own customers' data, see our
sec_8_p3_link: Data Processing Agreement & full sub-processor list
sec_9_row_7_2: Business owner can export or request deletion via privacy@askbiz.co
sec_10_title: 10. AskBiz POS — Point of Sale Module
sec_10_intro_post: (pos.askbiz.co) is a separate application for managing retail sales, inventory, and receipts. When using POS, the following additional data is processed:
sec_10_phone_1_post: Explicit customer consent (customer must provide phone number; never pre-filled)
sec_10_phone_2_post: Transmitted to WhatsApp/Meta for receipt delivery only
sec_10_phone_4_post: End-to-end encrypted by WhatsApp; AskBiz does not store receipt content
sec_10_phone_5_post: You can withdraw consent by not providing your phone number. You can request deletion of stored phone numbers at any time by contacting privacy@askbiz.co
sec_10_transaction_0_post: Products sold, quantities, prices, discounts applied, payment method, timestamps, and customer phone (if provided)
sec_10_transaction_1_post: Sales record-keeping, inventory management, business analytics, tax and accounting compliance
sec_10_transaction_3_post: Indefinitely (required by accounting and tax law in most jurisdictions for 7 years minimum)
sec_10_transaction_4_post: You can request an export of all your transaction data in JSON format. You can request deletion of specific transactions subject to local accounting law requirements. Contact privacy@askbiz.co
sec_10_staff_0_post: Staff PINs are hashed using bcrypt with unique salts. Raw PINs are never stored or logged
sec_10_staff_1_post: Only authenticated API calls can verify PINs. No staff member can see another staff member's PIN
sec_10_staff_2_post: Failed PIN attempts are logged for 90 days for security auditing, then automatically deleted
sec_10_staff_3_post: All PIN data is stored in Supabase (AWS EU West) with row-level security
sec_10_staff_4_post: Staff members can request deletion of failed login logs at any time. All PIN data is deleted when the staff account is deactivated
sec_10_inventory_0_post: Product names, SKUs, sale prices, cost prices, stock quantities, units, last sold dates
sec_10_inventory_1_post: Inventory management, stock tracking, sales analytics, product performance analysis
sec_10_inventory_4_post: You retain full ownership. You can export, modify, or delete any inventory data at any time through the POS interface
sec_10_camera_0_post: Camera images of barcodes, price tags, and product labels
sec_10_camera_1_post: Real-time product recognition for barcode lookup and price tag extraction
sec_10_camera_3_post: Images are processed in real time via our AI pipeline. Raw images are never stored on our servers — only the extracted data (product name, price, barcode number) is retained
sec_10_camera_4_post: Your browser will ask for camera access. You can revoke this at any time in your browser settings. Camera access is only used during active scanning sessions
sec_10_camera_5_post: You can disable camera scanning at any time and manually enter product details instead
sec_10_logistics_0_post: Parcel tracking numbers, delivery addresses, route information, vehicle inspection photos, driver handover records, and delivery timestamps
sec_10_logistics_1_post: Parcel tracking, delivery route management, vehicle inspection compliance, and logistics invoicing
sec_10_logistics_3_post: Logistics data retained for 12 months after delivery completion. Vehicle inspection photos retained for 6 months. Delivery addresses retained for shipment duration plus 90 days
sec_10_logistics_4_post: You can export all logistics data. You can request deletion of completed delivery records subject to local record-keeping requirements. Contact privacy@askbiz.co
sec_10_offline_0_post: During internet outages, cash sale transactions are stored in your browser’s local storage
sec_10_offline_1_post: Ensure business continuity when connectivity is temporarily lost
sec_10_offline_2_post: Locally stored transactions are automatically synced to our servers when connectivity resumes, then cleared from local storage
sec_10_offline_3_post: Local data is only accessible within your authenticated browser session
sec_10_mobilemoney_0_post: M-Pesa (Safaricom), MTN Mobile Money, Airtel Money — via PesaPal payment gateway
sec_10_mobilemoney_1_post: Transaction reference number, payment amount, and confirmation status
sec_10_mobilemoney_2_post: Processing subscription payments and POS seat purchases in markets where card payments are not widely available
sec_10_mobilemoney_4_post: Mobile money PINs are entered directly on the provider’s platform — AskBiz never sees, transmits, or stores your mobile money PIN
sec_10_mobilemoney_5_post: All mobile money transaction records follow the same retention and export policies as card payment records
sec_10_summary_post: The POS module processes personal data transparently with clear legal bases and user rights. Customer phone numbers are optional and automatically deleted after 30 days. Transaction history is retained for accounting compliance but can be exported or deleted upon request. Staff PINs are securely hashed and never visible to other users. Camera images are processed in real time and never stored. Logistics data is retained for 12 months after delivery. Mobile money PINs are never seen by AskBiz.
sec_11_p1: AskBiz serves users globally. Regardless of where you are located, you have the following rights. These satisfy EU GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA/CPRA (California), LGPD (Brazil), PIPEDA (Canada), POPIA (South Africa), Australia Privacy Act, PDPA (Thailand & Singapore), and most other applicable privacy laws.
sec_11_item_0_post: — Request a copy of all personal data we hold about you
sec_11_item_1_post: — Request deletion of your account and all data (30-day grace period applies). California, Brazilian, South African, and Canadian residents have this right by statute.
sec_11_item_2_post: — Correct inaccurate or incomplete data in your profile at any time
sec_11_item_3_post: — Receive your data in a machine-readable format (JSON). Available to all users.
sec_11_item_4_post: — Object to processing based on legitimate interest. California residents: you may also opt out of “sharing” for cross-context behavioural advertising — we do not do this.
sec_11_item_5_post: — Request we limit processing while a dispute is resolved
sec_11_item_6_post: — Withdraw consent for financial data and AI training at any time via Settings → Privacy, with immediate effect
sec_11_item_7_post: — We do not sell or share personal data with third parties for advertising. There is nothing to opt out of.
sec_11_item_8_post: — Exercising your privacy rights will never affect your service level or pricing
sec_11_p2_post: . We respond within 30 days (EU/UK GDPR: within 1 month; CCPA: within 45 days; LGPD: within 15 days).
sec_11_p3: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority: ICO (UK), Data Protection Commission (Ireland/EU), ANPD (Brazil), OPC (Canada), Information Regulator (South Africa), or your local equivalent.
sec_12_p1_pre: You can request deletion of your account and all associated data below. There is a
sec_12_p1_post: before permanent deletion to protect against accidental requests. You can cancel at any time during this period.
sec_12_p2_post: Profile, conversations, uploads, financial snapshots, IP hashes, and all associated data. Billing records are retained for 7 years as required by law.
sec_13_p1: AskBiz uses only essential cookies required for authentication. We do not use advertising cookies or third-party tracking cookies.
sec_14_p1: We use industry-standard measures to protect your data: encrypted connections (TLS), hashed IP addresses, row-level security on our database, and scoped API keys. Access to personal data is restricted to authorised personnel only.
sec_14_p2_post: that is likely to result in a risk to your rights and freedoms, we will:
sec_14_item_0_pre: Notify the relevant supervisory authority within
sec_14_item_0_post: of becoming aware (EU/UK GDPR Art. 33; LGPD Art. 48; PIPEDA; POPIA)
sec_14_item_1_post: when there is a high risk to their rights, including the nature of the breach, data affected, and steps taken
sec_14_item_2: Maintain an internal breach register for compliance purposes
sec_14_p3_pre: To report a suspected security vulnerability or breach, contact us immediately at
sec_15_p1: We will notify you by email of any material changes to this policy at least 14 days before they take effect. Continued use of AskBiz after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
delete_requested_body_pre: Your account is scheduled for permanent deletion on
delete_cancelled: ✓ Deletion cancelled — your account is safe
delete_body: Deleting your account will permanently remove all your data after a 30-day grace period. You can cancel the request at any time during those 30 days.
delete_confirm_prompt: Request account deletion? You have 30 days to cancel.
